allow: Bash(sed -i 's/t.Errorf\("expected count <= 10, got %d", count\)/t.Errorf\("expected 11 inflight, got %d", count\)/' broker/qos_engine_boundary_test.go)
Bash(awk '{sum += $1} END {print sum}' echo "" echo "client:" grep -c "func Test" "G:/shark-mqtt/client/"*_test.go)
Bash(awk '{sum += $1} END {print sum}' echo "" echo "store/redis:" grep -c "func Test" "G:/shark-mqtt/store/redis/"*_test.go)

Bash(sed -i 's/b.qos.TrackQoS2\(connectPkt.ClientID, msg.PacketID, msg.Topic, msg.Payload, msg.Retain\)/_ = b.qos.TrackQoS2\(connectPkt.ClientID, msg.PacketID, msg.Topic, msg.Payload, msg.Retain\)/' broker/broker.go)

Bash(sed -i 's/b.qos.TrackQoS1\(connectPkt.ClientID, msg.PacketID, msg.Topic, msg.Payload, msg.Retain\)/_ = b.qos.TrackQoS1\(connectPkt.ClientID, msg.PacketID, msg.Topic, msg.Payload, msg.Retain\)/' broker/broker.go)
Bash(sed -i '441s/.*/\\t\\t\\t\\tt.Error\("expected error when exceeding maxInflight, got nil"\)/' broker/qos_engine_boundary_test.go)
Bash(sed -i '443s/.*/\\t\\t\\t\\/\\/ Count should stay at maxInflight/' broker/qos_engine_boundary_test.go)

Bash(awk 'NR==435 {$0="\\t\\t\\t\\tif err := q.TrackQoS1\(\\"client1\\", uint16\(i\), \\"topic\\", []byte\(\\"data\\"\), false\); err != nil {"} NR==436 {$0="\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tt.Errorf\(\\"unexpected error at %d: %v\\", i, err\)"} NR==437 {$0="\\t\\t\\t\\t}"} NR==438 {$0=""} NR==439 {$0="\\t\\t\\t// Adding beyond limit should be rejected"} NR==440 {$0="\\t\\t\\terr := q.TrackQoS1\(\\"client1\\", 11, \\"topic\\", []byte\(\\"data\\"\), false\)"} NR==441 {$0="\\t\\t\\tif err == nil {"} NR==442 {$0="\\t\\t\\t\\tt.Error\(\\"expected error when exceeding maxInflight, got nil\\"\)"} NR==443 {$0="\\t\\t\\t}"} NR==444 {$0="\\t\\t\\t// Count should stay at maxInflight"} NR==445 {$0="\\t\\t\\tcount := q.InflightCount\(\\"client1\\"\)"} 1' broker/qos_engine_boundary_test.go)
Bash(sed -i '170s/.*/\\t\\t\\tif exists, err := b.sessionStore.IsSessionExists\(ctx, connectPkt.ClientID\); exists {/' broker/broker.go)
Bash(sed -i '171s/.*/\\t\\t\\t} else if err != nil {/' broker/broker.go)
Bash(sed -i '172s/.*/\\t\\t\\t\\tb.logger.Debug\("session exists check failed, treating as new", "clientID", connectPkt.ClientID, "error", err\)/' broker/broker.go)

Bash(sed -i '/if exists, storeErr := b.sessionStore.IsSessionExists\(ctx, connectPkt.ClientID\); exists {/a\\\\t\\t\\t} else if storeErr != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tb.logger.Debug\("session store IsSessionExists failed, treating as new", "clientID", connectPkt.ClientID, "error", storeErr\)' broker/broker.go)

Bash(printf '\\t\\t\\tif exists, storeErr := b.sessionStore.IsSessionExists\(ctx, connectPkt.ClientID\); exists {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\trestored, err := b.sessions.Restore\(ctx, connectPkt.ClientID\)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif err == nil && restored != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tisResuming = true\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tfor topic, qos := range restored.Subscriptions {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tb.topics.Subscribe\(topic, connectPkt.ClientID, qos\)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, msg := range restored.Inflight {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif msg.QoS == 2 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t_ = b.qos.TrackQoS2\(connectPkt.ClientID, msg.PacketID, msg.Topic, msg.Payload, msg.Retain\)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t} else {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t_ = b.qos.TrackQoS1\(connectPkt.ClientID, msg.PacketID, msg.Topic, msg.Payload, msg.Retain\)\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\t} else if storeErr != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tb.logger.Debug\("session store IsSessionExists failed, treating as new", "clientID", connectPkt.ClientID, "error", storeErr\)\\n\\t\\t\\t}')

Bash(sed -i '185a\\\\t\\t} else if storeErr != nil {\\n\\t\\t\\tb.logger.Debug\("session store IsSessionExists failed, treating as new", "clientID", connectPkt.ClientID, "error", storeErr\)' broker/broker.go)
